name: Aurora Background
description: A mesmerizing aurora borealis-style animated background with flowing gradient colors and smooth transitions.
whenToUse: Use as a full-page background for hero sections, landing pages, or any section that needs an eye-catching animated gradient background.

props.name: children
props.description: Content to render on top of the aurora background

props.name: className
props.description: Additional CSS classes for the container

props.name: showRadialGradient
props.description: Whether to show the radial gradient overlay
